calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wall for Carlos Bea and Donald Morehead.

Mr. Wall explained the services provided with regard to the sale of the proerty to support the request for extraordinary fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution.
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (31-33 Mallorca, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wall for Carlos Bea.

The sale was confirmed at $1,470,000.00. Bond is waived. The Court granted the petition, (subject to the written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (31-33 Mallorca, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Continued To Jan-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wall for Carlos Bea.

Mr. Wall requested a two week continuance in order to publish the notice of intent to sell the property and authorization to shorten time of notice of sale stating that the Buyer, the Agent and the Broker were all notified. The Court granted the request to shorten time and continued the matter to January 26, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
